CVE-2015-5198.title: libvdpau before 1.1.1, when used in a setuid or setgid applicatio ...
CVE-2015-5198.description: libvdpau before 1.1.1, when used in a setuid or setgid application, allows local users to gain privileges via unspecified vectors, related to the VDPAU_DRIVER_PATH environment variable.

CVE-2015-5199.title: Directory traversal vulnerability in dlopen in libvdpau before 1. ...
CVE-2015-5199.description: Directory traversal vulnerability in dlopen in libvdpau before 1.1.1 allows local users to gain privileges via the VDPAU_DRIVER environment variable.

CVE-2015-5200.title: The trace functionality in libvdpau before 1.1.1, when used in a  ...
CVE-2015-5200.description: The trace functionality in libvdpau before 1.1.1, when used in a setuid or setgid application, allows local users to write to arbitrary files via unspecified vectors.
